meta.title: Image Gallery
meta.description: Image collection that surfaces multiple images at once, with optional information layered over the thumbnails.

hero.title: Image Gallery
hero.desc: Image Gallery surfaces multiple images at once, pairing each thumbnail with select pieces of information.

usage.title: Usage
usage.desc:
Image Gallery splits into four categories by data type and state.

The four types reflect the nature of the content. Each of the four also carries separate Selected and Unfocused statuses.

items.title: Default Image
items.desc: The base form of an image element.

items.title: Image with Severity
items.desc: The form when the content carries severity information.

items.title: No Data
items.desc: The state when no data exists.

items.title: Image Empty
items.desc: The form when metadata exists but the image hasn't loaded.

status.title: Status
status.desc: Alert splits into two categories by composition — Container Alert and Text Alert. Built on a Basic Info Box of Info Text plus Info Icon. Text Alert and Container Alert are used when the information requires an action, or when information needs to be condensed and summarized.

items.title: Default
items.desc: The base state when accessing the image gallery.

items.title: Focused
items.desc: State for concentrating on a specific image content to perform an action tied to that element.

items.title: Unfocused
items.desc: Works alongside Focused — lowers the prominence of elements other than the focused one.

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.desc: Image Gallery image sizes flex to the gallery area assigned per screen. Top/bottom/left/right spacing stays fixed at 8px.

severityGroup.title: Severity Group
severityGroup.desc: Severity Badges in Gallery use the Circular Type, split into Count Severity Group (with count) and Severity Group (without count).

textLabel.title: Text Label
textLabel.desc: Surfaces image information as text below the image. Displays 'Blade / Blade Side / R Value' fields.
